memoryArtifacts.headline: History of Adam de Gordon (1356-1402)
memoryArtifacts.description:
Sir Adam de Gordon, Lord of Gordon (died 1402) was a 14th-century Scottish baron.

Life

He was son and heir of Sir John de Gordon, knight, Lord of Gordon, and his wife Elizabeth Cruickshanks. When Ge …

zh.Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Scotland: 蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾亨特利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Adam De Gordon於1356年1月出生在英國蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾亨特利時，他的父親John De Gordon14歲，母親Elizabeth Cruikshank10歲。他於1380年與Elisabeth De Keith在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1402年9月14日在英國諾圖波藍德享年46歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Adam De Gordon于1356年1月出生在英国苏格兰阿爾迪史爾亨特利时，他的父亲John De Gordon14岁，母亲Elizabeth Cruikshank10岁。他于1380年与Elisabeth De Keith在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1402年9月14日在英国諾圖波藍德享年46岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Gordon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Gordon in Berwickshire, named with Welsh gor ‘spacious’ + din ‘fort’.
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Gourdon in Saône-et-Loire, so called from the Gallo-Roman personal name Gordus + the locative suffix -o, -ōnis.
English (of Norman origin): alternatively, said to be a nickname from a diminutive of Old French gourd ‘heavy, dull, sluggish’ (compare 8 below).

variants.name: Gordin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Eyal, Moisey, Yakov, Zalman, Erez, Faina, Haya, Mendel.  Russian Leonid, Aleksandr, Boris, Feiga, Genady.
French: variant of   Gourdin  . This surname is very rare in France.

variants.name: Gordan
meanings: German: variant of Jordan . The surname Gordan is very rare in Germany.
Irish (Wexford and Sligo): adopted as an Anglicized form of Mag Mhuirneacháin ‘son of Muirneachán’, a personal name from a diminutive of muirneach ‘lovable’.

nameMeanings.name: Adam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Adam De Gordon was born in January 1356, in Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, John De Gordon, was 14 and his mother, Elizabeth Cruikshank, was 10. He married Elisabeth De Keith in 1380, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 14 September 1402, in Northumberland, England, at the age of 46.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Adam De Gordon est né en janvier 1356, à Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, John De Gordon, avait 14 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Cruikshank, avait 10 ans. Il a épousé Elisabeth De Keith en 1380, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 14 septembre 1402, à Northumberland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 46 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Adam De Gordon im Januar 1356 in Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John De Gordon 14 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Cruikshank 10. Er hat 1380 in Scotland Elisabeth De Keith geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 14. September 1402 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Northumberland, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Adam De Gordon è nato il nel gennaio 1356 nel Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John De Gordon, aveva 14 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Cruikshank, aveva 10 anni. Lui sposato Elisabeth De Keith nel 1380, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 14 settembre 1402, nel Northumberland, England, all'età di 46 anni.

ja.Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Scotland: スコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアハントリー
ja.lifeSummary: Sir Adam De Gordonが1356年1月にイギリススコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアハントリーで生まれた時，父John De Gordonは14歳，母Elizabeth Cruikshankは10歳であった。1380年にスコットランドでElisabeth De Keithと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1402年9月14日にイギリスノースウンバーランドで46歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Adam De Gordon(이)가 1356년 1월 영국 스코틀랜드 압르디실르 헌틀리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John De Gordon(은)는 14세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Cruikshank(은)는 10세였다. 그는 1380년 스컷랜드에서 Elisabeth De Keith(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1402년 9월 14일 영국 노르스벌랜드에서 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Adam De Gordon nasceu em janeiro de 1356, em Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, John De Gordon, tinha 14 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Cruikshank, tinha 10 anos. Ele casou-se com Elisabeth De Keith em 1380, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 14 de setembro de 1402, em Northumberland, Inglaterra, com 46 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Adam De Gordon родился январь 1356 г. в местности хантли, абирдиншир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John De Gordon было 14 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Cruikshank, 10. Он женился на женщине по имени Elisabeth De Keith в 1380 г. в местности Шотландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 14 сентября 1402 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия в возрасте 46 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Adam De Gordon nació en enero de 1356, en Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, John De Gordon, tenía 14 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Cruikshank, tenía 10 años. Se casó con Elisabeth De Keith en 1380, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 14 de septiembre de 1402, en Northumberland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 46 años.
